mapper.sql: select g.goods_id, g.category_id, c.category_name, g.goods_name, g.goods_type, g.cover_img, g.images, g.points, g.original_price, g.stock, g.sales, g.limit_per_user, g.description, g.status, g.sort, g.del_flag, g.version, g.create_by, g.create_time, g.update_by, g.update_time, g.remark from t_goods g left join t_goods_category c on c.category_id = g.category_id
mapper.select:
g.del_flag='0' and g.status='1'
and (g.category_id = #{categoryId} or g.category_id in ( select t.category_id from t_goods_category t where find_in_set(#{categoryId}, ancestors) ))
and g.goods_name like concat('%', #{goodsName}, '%')
order by g.sort desc, g.goods_id desc
mapper.insert:
insert into t_goods
category_id, goods_name, goods_type, cover_img, images, points, original_price, stock, limit_per_user, description, status, sort, create_by, remark, create_time, version
#{categoryId}, #{goodsName}, #{goodsType}, #{coverImg}, #{images}, #{points}, #{originalPrice}, #{stock}, #{limitPerUser}, #{description}, #{status}, #{sort}, #{createBy}, #{remark}, sysdate(), 0
mapper.update: update t_goods set del_flag='2' where goods_id in #{id}

update t_goods set stock = stock - #{quantity}, sales = sales + #{quantity}, version = version + 1 where goods_id=#{goodsId} and stock >= #{quantity} and version=#{version} and status='1' and del_flag='0'
update t_goods set stock = stock + #{quantity}, sales = greatest(sales - #{quantity}, 0), version = version + 1 where goods_id = #{goodsId}
update t_goods set status=#{status}, update_time=sysdate() where goods_id=#{goodsId}
mapper.select: select coalesce(sum(quantity),0) from t_order where user_id=#{userId} and goods_id=#{goodsId} and status <> '3'
